pages.title: Tip 1: Use Frequency System First
pages.text: $(bold)Before configuring PreFab faces$(): $(li)Enter CM dimension $(li)Name all Importers/Exporters with frequency system $(li)Exit CM dimension $(li)Configure PreFab faces$(br2)$(bold)Result$(): Dropdown shows clear names like "Coal Importer" instead of "Importer (abc-123)"

pages.title: Tip 2: Configure One Face at a Time
pages.text: Don't try to configure all 6 faces at once: $(li)Configure NORTH face → Test (place chest, verify items flow) $(li)Configure SOUTH face → Test $(li)Continue for other faces$(br2)Easier to debug if something goes wrong.

pages.title: Tip 3: Check Adjacent Blocks
pages.text: $(bold)Before setting PULL/PUSH$(): $(li)PULL faces need adjacent inventories in Overworld (chests, hoppers) $(li)PUSH faces need adjacent inventories in Overworld (chests, hoppers)$(br2)Place chests before configuring faces.

pages.title: Tip 4: Orient PreFab Correctly
pages.text: PreFab face directions are absolute (based on world directions, not player facing): $(li)Use F3 screen to see world directions $(li)Place PreFab with desired orientation $(li)Configure faces based on absolute directions

pages.title: Tip 5: Color-Code Chests
pages.text: $(bold)In Overworld$(): $(li)Blue chests for inputs (PULL faces) $(li)Red chests for outputs (PUSH faces)$(br2)Visual indicator helps remember which side is which.
